//: Example .omp/plugin-overrides.json for omp-legion. This is the host's real plugin-settings mechanism (getPluginSettings, JSON only — not config.yml, which is the host's own fixed settings schema and can't be extended by third-party plugins). Copy the "omp-legion" object below into your project's .omp/plugin-overrides.json under "settings". Every field is optional — anything you omit falls back to the defaults in src/domain/constants.ts.

coder.//: self-consistency samples only the first listed model -- list your strongest model first, and list just one to avoid the 'did you mean diverse?' warning.
